content.text:
Now I have a clear view of atom C:19 in the molecule. Looking at the image, I can see that atom C:19 (carbon with index 19) is connected to:

- C:18 (carbon with index 18) - to the right
- C:20 (carbon with index 20) - to the left
- H:34 (hydrogen with index 34) - upward
- H:35 (hydrogen with index 35) - downward

All these connections are shown as covalent bonds (yellow sticks connecting the atoms).

Based on the file name "geomconf_7305.xyz" and the directory structure, the geomconf_index for this molecule is 7305.

Therefore, the neighbor atoms of atom index 19 (C:19) are:
- Atom index 18 (C)
- Atom index 20 (C)
- Atom index 34 (H)
- Atom index 35 (H)

And the geomconf_index is 7305.

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 19, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
